mapper.select: select id, club_type, income_expend, project_id, project_name, subject_code, subject_name, budget, income_amount, membership_fee, write_off, expend_time, remark, create_time, update_time from tb_club_bill_detail where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_club_bill_detail(club_type, income_expend, project_id, project_name, subject_code, subject_name, budget, income_amount, membership_fee, write_off, expend_time, remark, create_time, update_time) values (#{clubType}, #{incomeExpend}, #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{subjectCode}, #{subjectName}, #{budget}, #{incomeAmount}, #{membershipFee}, #{writeOff}, #{expendTime}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into tb_club_bill_detail(club_type, income_expend, project_id, project_name, subject_code, subject_name, budget, income_amount, membership_fee, write_off, expend_time, remark, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.clubType}, #{entity.incomeExpend}, #{entity.projectId}, #{entity.projectName}, #{entity.subjectCode}, #{entity.subjectName}, #{entity.budget}, #{entity.incomeAmount}, #{entity.membershipFee}, #{entity.writeOff}, #{entity.expendTime}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into tb_club_bill_detail(club_type, income_expend, project_id, project_name, subject_code, subject_name, budget, income_amount, membership_fee, write_off, expend_time, remark, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.clubType}, #{entity.incomeExpend}, #{entity.projectId}, #{entity.projectName}, #{entity.subjectCode}, #{entity.subjectName}, #{entity.budget}, #{entity.incomeAmount}, #{entity.membershipFee}, #{entity.writeOff}, #{entity.expendTime}, #{entity.remark}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update club_type = values(club_type), income_expend = values(income_expend), project_id = values(project_id), project_name = values(project_name), subject_code = values(subject_code), subject_name = values(subject_name), budget = values(budget), income_amount = values(income_amount), membership_fee = values(membership_fee), write_off = values(write_off), expend_time = values(expend_time), remark = values(remark), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_club_bill_detail
club_type = #{clubType},
income_expend = #{incomeExpend},
project_id = #{projectId},
project_name = #{projectName},
subject_code = #{subjectCode},
subject_name = #{subjectName},
budget = #{budget},
income_amount = #{incomeAmount},
membership_fee = #{membershipFee},
write_off = #{writeOff},
expend_time = #{expendTime},
remark = #{remark},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
where id = #{id}
